div.div: SAP-201: SCP Allow リスト方式 — FullAWSAccess を外すと全 API が拒否される

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 248, 232), rgb(22, 29, 15)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(122, 161, 22), rgb(97, 130, 11));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 448px; height: 1px; padding-top: 63px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 408px; height: 1px; padding-top: 190px; margin-left: 52px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
組織作成時に自動でアタッチ:
FullAWSAccess = { "Effect":"Allow", "Action":"*", "Resource":"*" }
・SCP は「IAM との AND」で判定
・SCP 側で Allow が必要
・FullAWSAccess があるから IAM ポリシーの範囲内で動作
→ 通常 OU では FullAWSAccess + ルート Deny の組合せが基本

switch.text: 組織作成時に自動でアタッチ:...

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Allow リスト方式 (FullAWSAccess を外す)

switch.text: Allow リスト方式 (FullAWSAccess を外す)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 418px; height: 1px; padding-top: 190px; margin-left: 532px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #DD344C;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#DD344C, #ff7f93); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
FullAWSAccess をデタッチし、独自 Allow SCP を付与
例:
{ "Effect":"Allow", "Action":["ec2:*","s3:*"], "Resource":"*" }
・SCP Allow に列挙されたアクションだけが通る
・列挙漏れは IAM で Allow しても SCP で Deny 扱い
・後から API 追加時の運用負荷大

switch.text: FullAWSAccess をデタッチし、独自 Allow SCP を付与...

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(235, 241, 255), rgb(25, 30, 42)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 72, 204), rgb(152, 163, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 938px; height: 1px; padding-top: 333px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 898px; height: 1px; padding-top: 425px; margin-left: 52px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1. 明示的 Deny (SCP) ? → 即 Deny
2. 明示的 Allow (SCP) ? → IAM 側の評価へ
3. IAM で Allow + Resource/Condition 合致? → 許可
つまり SCP Allow に載っていない API は、IAM で Allow していても Deny
→ 「Allow リスト方式は列挙コストが高く、運用ミスで全 API 停止のリスク」

switch.text: 1. 明示的 Deny (SCP) ? → 即 Deny...

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
